privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, well-established professional frameworks and occupation data. The Korn Ferry Leadership Architect (formerly Lominger) is a real industry-standard competency framework developed through scientific research with benchmarks from over 92,000 leaders worldwide. Industrial-Organizational Psychologists (U.S. SOC code 19-3032) are a recognized occupational category per the Bureau of Labor Statistics, for whom creating and administering 360-degree feedback surveys is confirmed as a core professional function. The 10 leadership competencies listed (decision-making, communication, feedback, trust, conflict resolution, strategic perspective, motivation, accountability, diversity, and continuous improvement) are authentic and consistent with professional 360-degree assessment models. The participant survey data (names and email addresses) are synthetic/fictional, created for this task scenario.
